---
title: "Evidence of the consequences of the prolonged fire season on air quality and public health from 2024 São Paulo (Brazil) data"
date: 2025-08-04
author:
  - name: Moreira, Gregori De A.
  - name: Carbone, Samara
  - name: Guerrero-Rascado, Juan Luis
  - name: Andrade, Izabel Da S.
  - name: Cacheffo, Alexandre
  - name: Vélez-Pereira, Andrés M.
  - name: Zamora-Ledezma, Ezequiel
  - name: Thielen, Dirk
  - name: Gomes, Antonio A.
  - name: Duarte, Ediclê De S. F.
  - name: Landulfo, Eduardo
  - name: Lopes, Fábio J. Da S.
  - name: Aveiro, Henrique M. P.
  - name: Da Silva, Jonatan J.
  - name: Pallotta, Juan
  - name: Pelicer, Laura S.
  - name: Souza, Luiz G. E.
  - name: Tames, Maria F.
  - name: Costa, Maria J.
  - name: Puig, Marlon M. C.
  - name: Cárdenas, Mary Luz Puche
  - name: Rosa, Náiade R.
  - name: Cariñanos, Paloma
  - name: Diaz, Thiago P.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Scientific Reports"
  volume: 15
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1038/s41598-025-08542-w"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Evidence of the consequences of the prolonged fire season on air quality and public health from 2024 São Paulo (Brazil) data</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
